title: God of pickaxes
body:
Added New best pickaxe and new variant of netherite to minecraft.

### What pickaxe can do?
- With effciency 5 instant mine deepslate (block with max hardness 3.0)
- When in hand. Gives haste 4
- Better than netherite pickaxe
1. Durability: 2950 vs 2031
2. Better enchantability: 25 vs 15
3. Can instant mine a lot more block than netherite pickaxe.

### What is Hardened Netherite?
- New item which you can craft using: 2 iron ingot,1 netherite ingot.
- You need it to craft god of pickaxes.

  That mod will sure help you with mining. a place for a base in deepslate zone.

Recommending using a Extended edition
Link:https://modrinth.com/mod/god-of-pickaxes-extended-edition

you can use this mod inside modpacks
